atlas_description: Per-sample diversity / ROH / θπ landscape for the 226-sample pure C. gariepinus hatchery cohort. Decomposed from Diversity_atlas.html v2.4 (37 embedded tables, 8 page-level tabs). Round 2 added page9 'texture' (DDI + χ_min). Round 3 adds page10 'functional burden / selection efficacy' (new functional/ section: VESM + πN/πS + π0/π4 + LOF + ROH-overlap, plus variant inventory, transcript view, MSA panel), page11 'group divergence' (stratified/ section: pairwise FST/DXY/dA network with circular layout and hover CIs), and an ROH × gene-model extension to page5 (cumulative burden stack + biotype × peak heatmap). All three new payloads (functional_burden.json, roh_gene_overlap.json, divergence_network.json) are optional and ship as empty stubs — pages render no-data fallbacks until the upstream pipelines populate them.

pages.label: samples
pages.tooltip: Per-sample table — H, F_ROH, ROH bins, θπ summaries. Click row for drill-down.

pages.label: chromosomes
pages.tooltip: Per-chromosome diversity — θπ + F_ROH + per-chromosome KW tests.

pages.label: hotspots
pages.tooltip: θπ outlier windows — 19 hotspots above 99th percentile, with per-sample heatmap.

pages.label: ancestry
pages.tooltip: Ancestry × diversity — K=8 clusters, K-sweep K=2-12, per-Q correlations, KW + pairwise tests.

pages.label: ROH
pages.tooltip: ROH composition — length-class bins, per-chr × per-sample F_ROH heatmap, length spectrum.

pages.label: pruning & QC
pages.tooltip: Pruning & QC — NAToRA pruning, ngsF-HMM stability, Spearman correlation matrix, het in/out ROH.

pages.label: about
pages.tooltip: About — methods (SD1-SD8), glossary, headline numbers, data lineage.

pages.label: roadmap
pages.tooltip: Roadmap — what's still planned but not yet shipped.

pages.label: texture
pages.tooltip: Per-sample texture — DDI (within-genome dispersion of H_w) and χ_min (cohort-relative diversity floor). Companion to the F_ROH|H framework on page 5. Appended at end to preserve existing page numbering per the migration-discipline rule.

pages.label: burden
pages.tooltip: Functional burden / selection efficacy — five co-located layers: VESM deleterious burden, πN/πS, π0/π4, LOF count, ROH-overlap fraction. Variant inventory by snpEff impact class, GERP panel (off by default), transcript view, MSA panel. Stratified by K=8 / family / per-sample / F_ROH-quartile via a shared pill toggle (also used by page 5).

pages.label: divergence
pages.tooltip: Group-divergence network — node-link plot, nodes = K=8 ancestry groups (or per-farm / sex / karyotype), edges = pairwise FST / DXY / dA, edge thickness ∝ divergence. Circular layout default, force-directed toggle. Customisable edge filter (caret menu).

_stylesheets_doc: Round-1 ships one bundle (verbatim extraction of the legacy <style> block). Future work: split into per-page stylesheets (atlases/diversity/css/pages/page1.css etc.) and reference them from each page entry's `stylesheet` field — the router loads page-stylesheet on mount.
_scope_pickers_doc: No per-atlas scope pickers in round 1 — every page reads from the embedded_tables.json snapshot. When per-chromosome or per-cohort scope arrives, add pickers here (mirrors inversion-atlas activeChrom).
